name: Taquero Simulator
short_description: Clients are piling up, and they won't wait for long, mijo. Are you ready for the challenge? Prende your grill, chop your vegetables, and grab your carnes, it's time to become el mejor taquero there has ever been!
detailed_description:
Have you ever wondered if you could run your own taquería? We probably couldn't, but Taquero SImulator is here to let us try, cómo no!

Get ready, because the clients are hungry... and merciless! So grab your mandil, prende your grill, and make sure to choose carefully your ingredients. Remember: El cliente siempre tiene la razón.

In this game, you get to experience being a real taquero in a real barrio mexicano, or as close as we could get!

Think you got what it takes? Maybe three hambrientos clients will make you reconsider.

Grill.
Chop.
Serve.

Only three steps to become el mejor taquero!
